description_long: This object depicts a stylized figure seated in a wheelchair, with the person positioned centrally within a rectangular base. The figure's torso is upright, and the arms are positioned alongside the body, while the legs extend forward, resting on a platform. The wheelchair features a visible frame and wheels, with the wheels integrated into the sides of the chair. The entire object is rendered in a uniform, pale green color, and the surface appears smooth and hard. The rectangular base encases the lower portion of the wheelchair and figure, giving the impression of a relief or embedded sculpture. No additional accessories or details such as handrims or footrests are distinctly visible.
description: A stylized, upright seated figure in a wheelchair, embedded in a smooth, pale green rectangular block with visible wheels and frame.
description_view_0: The front view shows the figure seated upright in the wheelchair, with the torso, arms, and legs visible, and the wheels partially visible on the sides.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the length of the rectangular base and the profile of the seated figure, with the wheels and frame more clearly outlined.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the figure and wheelchair, with the wheels and frame visible but less detail on the figure's features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the profile of the figure and the wheelchair's side components.
attribute_wheel_configuration: two medium-sized wheels integrated on each side
attribute_seating_posture: upright with arms at sides and legs extended forward
